title: Context-Management Subsystem (5-layer)
description: Components inside the opencode runtime that implement the 5-layer bounded context-management model. Traceability: each component lists its IDEF0 moduleRef and the spec.md Requirement(s) it satisfies.

systems.name: opencode runtime
systems.description: The opencode daemon hosting sessions, runloops, prompt-build, and compaction. Context-management is a cross-cutting subsystem within this runtime.

containers.name: opencode-daemon
containers.description: The single long-lived process that hosts all sessions, runloops, and the prompt-build pipeline.

components.name: PromptBuilder
components.description: Owns the canonical 5-zone assembly [system, anchor, pinned_zone, journal, current_round]. Materialises pinned_zone from ContextMarkers. Injects ContextStatus into system prompt. Pre-prompt-build runs the marker parser.

components.name: Memory
components.description: First-class concepts: anchor, journal, pinned_zone. Reads from on-disk message stream (single source of truth). Provides recallMessage(sessionId?, msgId).

components.name: HybridCompactor
components.description: Implements tryHybridLlm with Phase 1 / Phase 2 + internal single-pass / chunk-and-merge modes. Wraps LLM_compact with sanity-check, retry, fallback per DD-6. Owns the framing prompt.

components.name: OverrideParser
components.description: Walks recent assistant messages, extracts ContextMarkers (pin/drop/recall), applies them to PromptBuilder state and HybridCompactor input.

components.name: ContextStatusBuilder
components.description: Computes total/used/remaining/anchor-cover/journal-depth/pinned-tokens at each prompt-build round; injects into system prompt or metadata channel (DD-S2).

components.name: ToolFramework
components.description: Provides ctx.outputBudget to every tool invocation. Hosts the bounded variants of read / glob / grep / bash / webfetch / apply_patch / task / system-manager_read_subsession.

components.name: CompactNowTool
components.description: Layer 4 voluntary summarize. Tool call dispatched through ToolFramework; handler invokes HybridCompactor and returns post-compaction budget stats.

components.name: TweaksConfig
components.description: Reads /etc/opencode/tweaks.cfg with hardcoded defaults. Knobs: tool.outputBudget.* / compaction.pinnedZone.maxTokensRatio / compaction.llmTimeoutMs / compaction.fallbackProvider / compaction.phase2.maxAnchorTokens.

components.name: TelemetryEmitter
components.description: Emits CompactionEvent records to the structured telemetry stream. Synchronous: event MUST land before runloop continues to next round.

components.name: AdminOverrideUI
components.description: Phase 5 surface. Admin panel + TUI buttons translate clicks into ContextMarkers attached to a synthesised assistant message.

relationships.label: applies pin (synthesise PinnedZoneEntry), recall (re-load from disk)
passes drop markers to LLM_compact input
produces ContextMarkers via synthesised assistant message

externals.name: LLM Provider (gpt / anthropic / codex / google)
externals.description: Receives LLMCompactRequest as a normal chat completion; returns the new anchor body.

externals.name: On-disk Message Stream
externals.description: Append-only persistent message log. Single source of truth for session state.
